elements.name: Register API returns 201 with new user

steps.name: the Auth API is available at "https://connectease-1.onrender.com"
the client sends a POST to "/api/auth/signup" with new user credentials
the API response status should be 201
the Auth API is available at "https://connectease-1.onrender.com"
the client sends a POST to "/api/auth/signup" with valid credentials
the API response status should be 400

elements.name: Login returns error body on bad credentials

steps.name: the Auth API is available at "https://connectease-1.onrender.com"
the client sends a POST to "/api/auth/signin" with invalid credentials
the response body should contain an error message

elements.name: AI Chat responds to a user query

steps.name: the user is logged in as a customer
the user navigates to the AI Chat page
the user asks AI Chat "What services do you offer?"
the AI Chat should respond to the first query

the user is on the community forum page
the user creates a new forum post with title "BDD Test Post"
the new post should appear in the forum

elements.name: Customer logout redirects to login page

steps.name: the user is logged in as a customer
the user clicks the logout button
the user should be redirected to the login page

elements.name: Vendor logout redirects to login page

steps.name: the user is logged in as a vendor
the user clicks the logout button
the user should be redirected to the login page

the user navigates directly to "/chats"

elements.name: Signup with duplicate email shows error

the user enters an already registered email "vishal.user@gmail.com"
a duplicate email error should be displayed

elements.name: Signup with password too short shows error

the user enters a password "123" that is too short
a password length error should be displayed

elements.name: Signup with invalid phone shows error

a phone number error should be displayed

elements.name: Vendor can create a new service listing

the vendor is on the vendor dashboard
the vendor fills in and submits the new service form
